name: Sun Dazzler
description:
Activate 1 Interact

This metallic tube has a complex array of lenses and prisms at one end and a hatch at the other. The hatch can be unlocked, loaded with a Sunrod, and refastened using 3 Interact actions. A loaded sun dazzler can be activated to burn the sunrod to dust in a single focused flash, creating a of scintillating light. All creatures in the cone must attempt a save, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is for 1 round.

Failure The creature is for 1 round or until it spends an Interact action to rub its eyes, ending the blinded condition.

Critical Failure The creature is blinded for 1 round.
